title: Stellar Sanctuary Safari
description: Join Star Scout Kip on an epic space adventure! Guide lost alien critters through dazzling cosmic landscapes back to their rightful homes in the Stellar Sanctuary. Use your special 'Beam' to gently lead them past playful
tagline: Explore the stars, rescue the critters, save the day!

title: Liana Leaper Legends
description: Embark on an exhilarating dash through a vibrant, ancient jungle! Play as Pip the agile Leafkin, racing across swinging lianas and towering vines. Gather magical Sun-Kissed Sprouts to reawaken the forest, all while dodgi
tagline: Swing, dash, and sprout your way to jungle glory!

title: Woodland Melody
description: Guide your playful Forest Sprite to catch shimmering rhythm notes and gracefully dodge disruptive sound waves. Help restore the magical harmony of the enchanted woods, one beat at a time!
tagline: Restore the forest's song, one beat at a time!

title: BubbleBlast Race
description: Dive into a dazzling underwater dash! Control a zippy sea creature through vibrant coral tunnels, collecting glistening Power Bubbles while outmaneuvering mischievous currents and grumpy sea foes.
tagline: Ride the currents, collect the bubbles, win the race!

title: Star-Switch Express
description: Join Captain Comet on a cosmic train adventure! Switch galactic rails, collect valuable stardust tickets, and skillfully avoid rogue asteroid carts as you deliver precious cargo across the solar system. A fast-paced dash
tagline: All aboard for a universe of fun!

title: Pirate Pearl Panic
tagline: Steal the tide, not the ship.

title: Clockwork Echo
description: Stabilize a city inside a giant clock, gather time sparks, calm runaway mechanisms, and face the final midnight resonance.
